name: Fasolakia Yiyantes Sto Fourno (Oven-baked G
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 pounds Tomatoes, peeled and crushed OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and place them in a large bowl of cold water. Soak overnight.
2. Drain the beans, then transfer to a pot with fresh, cold salted water. Cook for 45 minutes, then drain.
3. In a baking pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add unpeeled garlic and onions. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until golden brown.
4. Add beans, celery, parsley, salt, pepper, and hot water to the baking pan. Return to oven and bake for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and stir the beans. Pour in crushed tomatoes (or diluted tomato paste). Return to oven and bake until only the oil remains.
